profile.major: Arts, Technology & the Business of Innovation
profile.belief: Unfashionable today is just taste six months ahead. Hold it anyway.
profile.working_on: Hand-carving every word for a bakery's social feed so text looks baked by their ovens, not typed.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire to blend artistry with authenticity, celebrating tradition while confidently anticipating the evolving tastes of tomorrow.
